task: evaluate whether an X audience of 120000 followers discussing AI productivity likely contains buyers

assessment.bottom_line: Large reach does not currently prove meaningful buyer presence. Some buyers are likely present, but most followers are probably not qualified buyers based on the reported audience mix.

reasoning: Students and hobbyists usually indicate strong interest but weaker purchasing power.
Follower count measures attention, not budget, urgency, or authority.
AI productivity content is broad and tends to attract many non-commercial learners.
A smaller subset of founders, operators, consultants, or team leads may still be viable buyers.
key_risks: misreading public audience as buyer pool
recommended_next_steps: post buyer-specific questions to identify business pain
test a business-oriented offer and track clicks or replies
segment respondents by role and budget authority
measure booked calls, qualified replies, and conversions instead of likes
